headline: These Dividend Kings Have Raised Their Dividends for 50+ Years
summary: If your plan is to earn passive income from stocks, you’d might as well pick out the ones that offer dividend growth. When a company has raised its dividend distributions for a very long time, that’s a reassuring sign for investors. There are legions of stocks out there to choose from, but most of them ... headline: Dow Jones set to open lower but Broadcom poised for gains
summary: US futures were pointing to a softer open on Wall Street on Thursday, after Iran de-escalation hopes earlier boosted European markets before being played down. Dow Jones futures were down 0.5%, with the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq both slipping 0.2%. A day earlier, US stocks closed solidly...
